title: Mo' Craftian Forms [Cobblemon]
description: Adds Minecraft themed Cobblemon to your world
body:
Information
-----
This datapack adds many different Minecraft themed Cobblemon to your game. A list of them and how to obtain them can be found in the README text file in the pack. If you're here from my post in the Cobblemon discord, Craftian Sableye and Splocue are implemented but currently unobtainable in the pack. I wouldn't recommend spawning them in to use on your team though. I'm not happy with their designs and I might change more in the future than just their models like base stats and movepools.
